intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of Chest X-Ray images in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. The device
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of Chest X-Ray images in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspect positive cases with Pneumothorax (Ptx) findings.
ground_truth: Ground truth established by two radiologists with an additional third radiologist to resolve inconsistencies
other_metrics: PLR: 10.28%, NLR: 0.06%, Time-to-notification: 13.1 seconds (95% CI: 10.6-15.7; Median 11.8, IQR 15.8)
